ConnectionStrings._comment: Production DB connection. Leave blank here — supply via the ConnectionStrings__Default environment variable (never commit the production password).

App._comment_TimeZone: IANA name used to pin the DB session timezone for in-SQL date bucketing (reports/dashboards). Keep in sync with each portal's environment.timeZoneOffset. Default Asia/Kolkata (IST).

Jobs._comment_ReminderThrottle: A customer/visit/order/tenant reminded within *MinIntervalDays is skipped on later runs (recorded in reminder_log), so reminders don't re-send every time the job runs. Default: payment 3, amc 7, advance-order 7, subscription-expiry 3.
Jobs._comment_SubscriptionInvoiceLeadDays: How many days before a paid subscription's end date the SubscriptionExpiryJob raises the Pending renewal invoice (also covers already-lapsed tenants). Default 5.

Jwt._comment: Secret is supplied via the Jwt__Secret environment variable in production (never commit it).

Google._comment: Supply ClientId / ClientSecret via Google__ClientId / Google__ClientSecret environment variables.

Razorpay._comment: Supply live keys via Razorpay__KeyId / Razorpay__KeySecret / Razorpay__WebhookSecret environment variables.

Email._comment: Active transactional email provider: SendGrid | Resend. Selected in Infrastructure DI.

Resend._comment: Supply the API key via the Resend__ApiKey environment variable in production (never commit it). FromEmail's domain must be DNS-verified in Resend.

Notifications._comment: Master on/off switch per outbound channel. When false, that channel never sends (regardless of API keys or plan). WhatsApp also requires the tenant's plan feature. Missing key defaults to true.

CustomerNotifications._comment: Per-event switches for the tenant → customer notifications, layered on top of the channel switches above (an event sends only when its switch AND the channel are on). All off for v1. Missing key defaults to true. InvoiceSent gates only the customer email — the PDF is still generated, stored and the invoice marked Sent. The three reminders are recurring jobs that exit immediately when their switch is off.
